title: customdrones
description: a palladium addon that the ability to become a worker drone
body:
the mod adds: \
player worker drones \
character customazation \
commands for character customazation \
and eventualy it will have emotions \
so make sure to check up on the updates for the EMOTIONS UPDATE and have fun 

character customization options: \
LEFT EYE COLOR \
RIGHT EYE COLOR \
CORE COLOR (core is the white part on the torso of the workerdrone player) \
HAIR COLOR \
SHIRT COLOR \
PANTS COLOR \
SHOES COLOR
